description: Multiple users report widespread video playback failures. The agent must diagnose the issue, suspecting a CDN problem.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the high volume of user complaints about playback errors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a spike in playback error reports.

nodes.task_description: Check the status dashboards of all primary CDN providers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that a major CDN provider is reporting a partial outage in North America.

nodes.task_description: Execute a command to reroute all North American traffic to the secondary CDN provider.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the CDN traffic management configuration.
